_comment: Single source of truth for the 3 passes. Tools and dashboard read from this. Order matters — index 0 is Pass 1 (baseline).

passes.label: Pass 1: Opus only
passes.description: Baseline — every phase runs on Claude Opus 4.7. The premium ceiling.

passes.label: Pass 2: Opus + Gemini Pro
passes.description: Mid-tier orchestration — premium-judgment phases on Opus, cost-efficient phases on Gemini 3.1 Pro.

passes.label: Pass 3: Opus + Gemini Flash
passes.description: Aggressive cost optimization — premium phases on Opus, cost-efficient phases on Gemini 3.5 Flash.

model_substitutions._comment: Where a user-requested model ID is not yet GA on the API, we substitute the closest available and label here. The dashboard renders the requested ID with a small badge noting the substitution.

gemini-3.1-pro.reason: gemini-3.1-pro not GA as of 2026-05-24; gemini-2.5-pro is the closest production-available Pro-tier model.
